TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Talu a acawa, Talu ku acawa anca Taywan ku acawa, uyza Cung-hwa-min-kuw Taywan a tademaw Cung-kuw Ta-luay ku acawa, Cung-hwa min-kuw cen-bu a hulic Taywan sin-cu-min han. Cung-hwa zen-min-kung-he-kuw u milakec tu Taywan malaacawaw, u saacawaen nu Taywan. Cung-hwa zen-min-kung-he-kuw u situngusa tu sakauzip nu tademaw amin i 2015 a mihca 12 a bulad mikawawan "tusa a kanatalan mikawaw tu malaacaway nitiyangen, malaacawa ku tusaay a kanatal, tizaay a tademaw malaacawaw ku tusaay a kanatal han, Talu a tademaw Talu a acawa han "kamu nu Ing, spouse from Mainland" Taywan milakuit tu saacawaan, katuud ku Taluay a acawa. uyza milakuit tu siwa Cung-kuw Talu tatayna a acawa atu sakaput a tatama nu Taywan, Taywan sinbun a sinsinbungan, hatu "Talu/Cung-kuw acawana" han. piazih nu zuma, Talu a acawa kapah ku nidiput nu Cung-hwa-min-kuw cen-bu, tu canacanan a kasitungus nu zumaay kanatal a acaw. 1992 a mihcaan, Cung-hwa-min-kuw cen-bu pabinawlan tu Taluay a acawa tayni i Taywan mana'nel. duduc tu nu hulic, imahini Taluay a acawa kapah micumud i Taywan zikuz kapah misinsi tu sakisitungus mueneng luma' nu acawa, mueneng i luma' nu acawa 4 a mihcaan kapah misinsi tu amatines ku eneng, madem ku 2 a mihcaan zikuz mapatay ku acawa patahkal tu cen-min kapah misinsi a mana'nel, ayza "makay pueneng i luma' nu acawa saapuyu'ay 6 a mihcaan" kapah a pakika, misinsi tu Cuwng-hwa-min-kuw a bimunsiw, pakutay han tu Taywan a tademaw. i Cuwng-hwa-zen-min-kung-he-kuw atu hulican nu kanatal, u ngangan pakutay han tu Taywan a tademaw. i hulicay a kawawan, i Taluay a acawa "anuca maala tu ku nu Tayawanay a minbunsiw nu Taluay a acawa" micaluk tu Taluay a zaysang "mahiniay luma', nisinga' i gingku tu kalisiw" malalitin tu ku hulic nu tusaay a kanatal "tatungus a tusa ku hulic tatengaay tu a minbusiw, pakayni tatenga'ay tu ku ngangan asitungus micaluk, miazih tu micalukay atu mapacalukay u kacacayat nu hulic. u pikawawan, anu malilid ku mueneng i Taywan a tademaw, atu laluma'an tatenga' a tatungus tu hulic nu Taywan u mamicaluk tu a kawaw. hulic a pilisimet tu zaysang, tini i Taluay a alala' luma' umah, kalisiw "mahiniay gingkuay a nisinga' tu kalisiw cin-cyen" milisimet tu sapicaluk, atatungus micaluk tu nu Cuwng-hwa-zen-min-kung-he-kuw a "hulic". Talu a acaw micumud tu i kika nu Taywanan, u tademaw tu nu Taywanan, sutungus tu misingkiw, nika "kacacayat nu tusaay a kanatal a hulic" nipaketunan, madem ku cacay a bataan a mihcaan ku kasikika i Taywab nu Taluay a acawa, kya taneng malakumunging. . i Taywan "Ta-luay a acawa" malakui' tu 30 mang ku tademaw, katuud tu ku pakaalaay tu nu Cung-hwa-min-kuw a mibunsiw, situngus tu misingkiw, amala misingkiway. katukuh 2014 a mihcaan, mahizaay milihizaay misingki tu Cung-kuw-kuw-min situngusay ci Kaw-tantan, sakalah sa amala midamaay tu kuw-min-tang Cung -kuw-sen-can-tang ci Lu-ye-syang. . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == tar~…ĺu a a ¶awa, tar~…ĺu ku a ¶awa an ¶a tajwan ku a ¶awa, ujza ¶uŇč-ńßwa-min-kuw tajwan a tad…ômaw ¶uŇč-kuw ta-r~…ĺuaj ku a ¶awa, ¶uŇč-ńßwa min-kuw ¶…ôn-bu a ńßur~…ĺi ¶ tajwan sin- ¶u-min ńßan. ¶uŇč-ńßwa z…ôn-min-kuŇč-ńß…ô-kuw u mir~…ĺak…ô ¶ tu tajwan mar~…ĺaa ¶awaw, u saa ¶awa…ôn nu tajwan. ¶uŇč-ńßwa z…ôn-min-kuŇč-ńß…ô-kuw u situŇčusa tu sakauzip nu tad…ômaw amin i **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad mikawawan "tusa a kanatar~…ĺan mikawaw tu mar~…ĺaa ¶awaj nitijaŇč…ôn, mar~…ĺaa ¶awa ku tusaaj a kanatar~…ĺ, tizaaj a tad…ômaw mar~…ĺaa ¶awaw ku tusaaj a kanatar~…ĺ ńßan, tar~…ĺu a tad…ômaw tar~…ĺu a a ¶awa ńßan "kamu nu iŇč, spous…ô from mainr~…ĺand" tajwan mir~…ĺakuit tu saa ¶awaan, katuud ku tar~…ĺuaj a a ¶awa. ujza mir~…ĺakuit tu siwa ¶uŇč-kuw tar~…ĺu tatajna a a ¶awa atu sakaput a tatama nu tajwan, tajwan sinbun a sinsinbuŇčan, ńßatu "tar~…ĺu/ ¶uŇč-kuw a ¶awana" ńßan. piazińß nu zuma, tar~…ĺu a a ¶awa kapańß ku nidiput nu ¶uŇč-ńßwa-min-kuw ¶…ôn-bu, tu ¶ana ¶anan a kasituŇčus nu zumaaj kanatar~…ĺ a a ¶aw. **** a mińß ¶aan, ¶uŇč-ńßwa-min-kuw ¶…ôn-bu pabinawr~…ĺan tu tar~…ĺuaj a a ¶awa tajni i tajwan mana Ē~ °n…ôr~…ĺ. dudu ¶ tu nu ńßur~…ĺi ¶, imańßini tar~…ĺuaj a a ¶awa kapańß mi ¶umud i tajwan zikuz kapańß misinsi tu sakisituŇčus mu…ôn…ôŇč r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu a ¶awa, mu…ôn…ôŇč i r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu a ¶awa * a mińß ¶aan kapańß misinsi tu amatin…ôs ku …ôn…ôŇč, mad…ôm ku * a mińß ¶aan zikuz mapataj ku a ¶awa patańßkar~…ĺ tu ¶…ôn-min kapańß misinsi a mana Ē~ °n…ôr~…ĺ, ajza "makaj pu…ôn…ôŇč i r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu a ¶awa saapuju Ē~ °aj * a mińß ¶aan" kapańß a pakika, misinsi tu ¶uwŇč-ńßwa-min-kuw a bimunsiw, pakutaj ńßan tu tajwan a tad…ômaw. i ¶uwŇč-ńßwa-z…ôn-min-kuŇč-ńß…ô-kuw atu ńßur~…ĺi ¶an nu kanatar~…ĺ, u ŇčaŇčan pakutaj ńßan tu tajwan a tad…ômaw. i ńßur~…ĺi ¶aj a kawawan, i tar~…ĺuaj a a ¶awa "anu ¶a maar~…ĺa tu ku nu tajawanaj a minbunsiw nu tar~…ĺuaj a a ¶awa" mi ¶ar~…ĺuk tu tar~…ĺuaj a zajsaŇč "mańßiniaj r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, nisiŇča Ē~ ° i giŇčku tu kar~…ĺisiw" mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu ku ńßur~…ĺi ¶ nu tusaaj a kanatar~…ĺ "tatuŇčus a tusa ku ńßur~…ĺi ¶ tat…ôŇčaaj tu a minbusiw, pakajni tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj tu ku ŇčaŇčan asituŇčus mi ¶ar~…ĺuk, miazińß tu mi ¶ar~…ĺukaj atu mapa ¶ar~…ĺukaj u ka ¶a ¶ajat nu ńßur~…ĺi ¶. u pikawawan, anu mar~…ĺir~…ĺid ku mu…ôn…ôŇč i tajwan a tad…ômaw, atu r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an tat…ôŇča Ē~ ° a tatuŇčus tu ńßur~…ĺi ¶ nu tajwan u mami ¶ar~…ĺuk tu a kawaw. ńßur~…ĺi ¶ a pir~…ĺisim…ôt tu zajsaŇč, tini i tar~…ĺuaj a ar~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° umańß, kar~…ĺisiw "mańßiniaj giŇčkuaj a nisiŇča Ē~ ° tu kar~…ĺisiw ¶in- ¶j…ôn" mir~…ĺisim…ôt tu sapi ¶ar~…ĺuk, atatuŇčus mi ¶ar~…ĺuk tu nu ¶uwŇč-ńßwa-z…ôn-min-kuŇč-ńß…ô-kuw a "ńßur~…ĺi ¶". tar~…ĺu a a ¶aw mi ¶umud tu i kika nu tajwanan, u tad…ômaw tu nu tajwanan, sutuŇčus tu misiŇčkiw, nika "ka ¶a ¶ajat nu tusaaj a kanatar~…ĺ a ńßur~…ĺi ¶" nipak…ôtunan, mad…ôm ku ¶a ¶aj a bataan a mińß ¶aan ku kasikika i tajwab nu tar~…ĺuaj a a ¶awa, kja tan…ôŇč mar~…ĺakumuŇčiŇč. . i tajwan "ta-r~…ĺuaj a a ¶awa" mar~…ĺakui Ē~ ° tu ** maŇč ku tad…ômaw, katuud tu ku pakaar~…ĺaaj tu nu ¶uŇč-ńßwa-min-kuw a mibunsiw, situŇčus tu misiŇčkiw, amar~…ĺa misiŇčkiwaj. katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan, mańßizaaj mir~…ĺińßizaaj misiŇčki tu ¶uŇč-kuw-kuw-min situŇčusaj ¶i kaw-tantan, sakar~…ĺańß sa amar~…ĺa midamaaj tu kuw-min-taŇč ¶uŇč -kuw-s…ôn- ¶an-taŇč ¶i r~…ĺu-j…ô-sjaŇč. . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Talu a acawa, Talu ku acawa anca Taywan ku acawa, uyza Cung-hwa-min-kuw Taywan a tademaw Cung-kuw Ta-luay ku acawa, Cung-hwa min-kuw cen-bu a hulic Taywan sin-cu-min han. Cung-hwa zen-min-kung-he-kuw u milakec tu Taywan malaacawaw, u saacawaen nu Taywan. Cung-hwa zen-min-kung-he-kuw u situngusa tu sakauzip nu tademaw amin i 2015 a mihca 12 a bulad mikawawan "tusa a kanatalan mikawaw tu malaacaway nitiyangen, malaacawa ku tusaay a kanatal, tizaay a tademaw malaacawaw ku tusaay a kanatal han, Talu a tademaw Talu a acawa han "kamu nu Ing, spouse from Mainland" Taywan milakuit tu saacawaan, katuud ku Taluay a acawa. uyza milakuit tu siwa Cung-kuw Talu tatayna a acawa atu sakaput a tatama nu Taywan, Taywan sinbun a sinsinbungan, hatu "Talu/Cung-kuw acawana" han. piazih nu zuma, Talu a acawa kapah ku nidiput nu Cung-hwa-min-kuw cen-bu, tu canacanan a kasitungus nu zumaay kanatal a acaw. 1992 a mihcaan, Cung-hwa-min-kuw cen-bu pabinawlan tu Taluay a acawa tayni i Taywan mana'nel. duduc tu nu hulic, imahini Taluay a acawa kapah micumud i Taywan zikuz kapah misinsi tu sakisitungus mueneng luma' nu acawa, mueneng i luma' nu acawa 4 a mihcaan kapah misinsi tu amatines ku eneng, madem ku 2 a mihcaan zikuz mapatay ku acawa patahkal tu cen-min kapah misinsi a mana'nel, ayza "makay pueneng i luma' nu acawa saapuyu'ay 6 a mihcaan" kapah a pakika, misinsi tu Cuwng-hwa-min-kuw a bimunsiw, pakutay han tu Taywan a tademaw. i Cuwng-hwa-zen-min-kung-he-kuw atu hulican nu kanatal, u ngangan pakutay han tu Taywan a tademaw. i hulicay a kawawan, i Taluay a acawa "anuca maala tu ku nu Tayawanay a minbunsiw nu Taluay a acawa" micaluk tu Taluay a zaysang "mahiniay luma', nisinga' i gingku tu kalisiw" malalitin tu ku hulic nu tusaay a kanatal "tatungus a tusa ku hulic tatengaay tu a minbusiw, pakayni tatenga'ay tu ku ngangan asitungus micaluk, miazih tu micalukay atu mapacalukay u kacacayat nu hulic. u pikawawan, anu malilid ku mueneng i Taywan a tademaw, atu laluma'an tatenga' a tatungus tu hulic nu Taywan u mamicaluk tu a kawaw. hulic a pilisimet tu zaysang, tini i Taluay a alala' luma' umah, kalisiw "mahiniay gingkuay a nisinga' tu kalisiw cin-cyen" milisimet tu sapicaluk, atatungus micaluk tu nu Cuwng-hwa-zen-min-kung-he-kuw a "hulic". Talu a acaw micumud tu i kika nu Taywanan, u tademaw tu nu Taywanan, sutungus tu misingkiw, nika "kacacayat nu tusaay a kanatal a hulic" nipaketunan, madem ku cacay a bataan a mihcaan ku kasikika i Taywab nu Taluay a acawa, kya taneng malakumunging. . i Taywan "Ta-luay a acawa" malakui' tu 30 mang ku tademaw, katuud tu ku pakaalaay tu nu Cung-hwa-min-kuw a mibunsiw, situngus tu misingkiw, amala misingkiway. katukuh 2014 a mihcaan, mahizaay milihizaay misingki tu Cung-kuw-kuw-min situngusay ci Kaw-tantan, sakalah sa amala midamaay tu kuw-min-tang Cung -kuw-sen-can-tang ci Lu-ye-syang. . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == tar~…ĺu a a ¶awa, tar~…ĺu ku a ¶awa an ¶a tajwan ku a ¶awa, ujza ¶uŇč-ńßwa-min-kuw tajwan a tad…ômaw ¶uŇč-kuw ta-r~…ĺuaj ku a ¶awa, ¶uŇč-ńßwa min-kuw ¶…ôn-bu a ńßur~…ĺi ¶ tajwan sin- ¶u-min ńßan. ¶uŇč-ńßwa z…ôn-min-kuŇč-ńß…ô-kuw u mir~…ĺak…ô ¶ tu tajwan mar~…ĺaa ¶awaw, u saa ¶awa…ôn nu tajwan. ¶uŇč-ńßwa z…ôn-min-kuŇč-ńß…ô-kuw u situŇčusa tu sakauzip nu tad…ômaw amin i **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad mikawawan "tusa a kanatar~…ĺan mikawaw tu mar~…ĺaa ¶awaj nitijaŇč…ôn, mar~…ĺaa ¶awa ku tusaaj a kanatar~…ĺ, tizaaj a tad…ômaw mar~…ĺaa ¶awaw ku tusaaj a kanatar~…ĺ ńßan, tar~…ĺu a tad…ômaw tar~…ĺu a a ¶awa ńßan "kamu nu iŇč, spous…ô from mainr~…ĺand" tajwan mir~…ĺakuit tu saa ¶awaan, katuud ku tar~…ĺuaj a a ¶awa. ujza mir~…ĺakuit tu siwa ¶uŇč-kuw tar~…ĺu tatajna a a ¶awa atu sakaput a tatama nu tajwan, tajwan sinbun a sinsinbuŇčan, ńßatu "tar~…ĺu/ ¶uŇč-kuw a ¶awana" ńßan. piazińß nu zuma, tar~…ĺu a a ¶awa kapańß ku nidiput nu ¶uŇč-ńßwa-min-kuw ¶…ôn-bu, tu ¶ana ¶anan a kasituŇčus nu zumaaj kanatar~…ĺ a a ¶aw. **** a mińß ¶aan, ¶uŇč-ńßwa-min-kuw ¶…ôn-bu pabinawr~…ĺan tu tar~…ĺuaj a a ¶awa tajni i tajwan mana Ē~ °n…ôr~…ĺ. dudu ¶ tu nu ńßur~…ĺi ¶, imańßini tar~…ĺuaj a a ¶awa kapańß mi ¶umud i tajwan zikuz kapańß misinsi tu sakisituŇčus mu…ôn…ôŇč r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu a ¶awa, mu…ôn…ôŇč i r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu a ¶awa * a mińß ¶aan kapańß misinsi tu amatin…ôs ku …ôn…ôŇč, mad…ôm ku * a mińß ¶aan zikuz mapataj ku a ¶awa patańßkar~…ĺ tu ¶…ôn-min kapańß misinsi a mana Ē~ °n…ôr~…ĺ, ajza "makaj pu…ôn…ôŇč i r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu a ¶awa saapuju Ē~ °aj * a mińß ¶aan" kapańß a pakika, misinsi tu ¶uwŇč-ńßwa-min-kuw a bimunsiw, pakutaj ńßan tu tajwan a tad…ômaw. i ¶uwŇč-ńßwa-z…ôn-min-kuŇč-ńß…ô-kuw atu ńßur~…ĺi ¶an nu kanatar~…ĺ, u ŇčaŇčan pakutaj ńßan tu tajwan a tad…ômaw. i ńßur~…ĺi ¶aj a kawawan, i tar~…ĺuaj a a ¶awa "anu ¶a maar~…ĺa tu ku nu tajawanaj a minbunsiw nu tar~…ĺuaj a a ¶awa" mi ¶ar~…ĺuk tu tar~…ĺuaj a zajsaŇč "mańßiniaj r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, nisiŇča Ē~ ° i giŇčku tu kar~…ĺisiw" mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu ku ńßur~…ĺi ¶ nu tusaaj a kanatar~…ĺ "tatuŇčus a tusa ku ńßur~…ĺi ¶ tat…ôŇčaaj tu a minbusiw, pakajni tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj tu ku ŇčaŇčan asituŇčus mi ¶ar~…ĺuk, miazińß tu mi ¶ar~…ĺukaj atu mapa ¶ar~…ĺukaj u ka ¶a ¶ajat nu ńßur~…ĺi ¶. u pikawawan, anu mar~…ĺir~…ĺid ku mu…ôn…ôŇč i tajwan a tad…ômaw, atu r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an tat…ôŇča Ē~ ° a tatuŇčus tu ńßur~…ĺi ¶ nu tajwan u mami ¶ar~…ĺuk tu a kawaw. ńßur~…ĺi ¶ a pir~…ĺisim…ôt tu zajsaŇč, tini i tar~…ĺuaj a ar~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° umańß, kar~…ĺisiw "mańßiniaj giŇčkuaj a nisiŇča Ē~ ° tu kar~…ĺisiw ¶in- ¶j…ôn" mir~…ĺisim…ôt tu sapi ¶ar~…ĺuk, atatuŇčus mi ¶ar~…ĺuk tu nu ¶uwŇč-ńßwa-z…ôn-min-kuŇč-ńß…ô-kuw a "ńßur~…ĺi ¶". tar~…ĺu a a ¶aw mi ¶umud tu i kika nu tajwanan, u tad…ômaw tu nu tajwanan, sutuŇčus tu misiŇčkiw, nika "ka ¶a ¶ajat nu tusaaj a kanatar~…ĺ a ńßur~…ĺi ¶" nipak…ôtunan, mad…ôm ku ¶a ¶aj a bataan a mińß ¶aan ku kasikika i tajwab nu tar~…ĺuaj a a ¶awa, kja tan…ôŇč mar~…ĺakumuŇčiŇč. . i tajwan "ta-r~…ĺuaj a a ¶awa" mar~…ĺakui Ē~ ° tu ** maŇč ku tad…ômaw, katuud tu ku pakaar~…ĺaaj tu nu ¶uŇč-ńßwa-min-kuw a mibunsiw, situŇčus tu misiŇčkiw, amar~…ĺa misiŇčkiwaj. katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan, mańßizaaj mir~…ĺińßizaaj misiŇčki tu ¶uŇč-kuw-kuw-min situŇčusaj ¶i kaw-tantan, sakar~…ĺańß sa amar~…ĺa midamaaj tu kuw-min-taŇč ¶uŇč -kuw-s…ôn- ¶an-taŇč ¶i r~…ĺu-j…ô-sjaŇč. . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
